page_title: "akka_project Resource - Akka"

  Creates and manages an Akka project.
---

# akka_project

Creates and manages an Akka project. A project is the top-level container for services, secrets,
routes, and role bindings on the Akka platform.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "akka_project" "example" {
  name        = "my-project"
  description = "My Akka project"
  region      = "gcp-us-east1"
}

output "project_id" {
  value = akka_project.example.id
}
```

## Schema

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Project name. Unique within the organization. Changing forces recreation.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Human-readable project description.
- `organization` (String) Organization override. Defaults to provider-level organization.
- `region` (String) Primary deployment region.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Internal Akka project ID.

## Import

Import an existing project by its name:

```shell
terraform import akka_project.example my-project-name
```
